popularStory.headline: My Maternal 21st. Great Scottish Grandmother, Eugena MacDonnchadh, de Ergadia
popularStory.description:
Name: Eugena MacDonnchadh, de Ergadia, daughter of King Dougall MacSomerled of the Isles and Miss Muchdanach
Born: 1204 in Dunollie Castle, Oban, Argyll, Scotland
Married: 1225 in Dunollie, Argyll, Sc …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill於1212年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn35歲，母親Lady Margaret MacLachlan35歲。他於1233年與Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia在蘇格蘭阿吉爾登利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1268年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特奧班享年56歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特登利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill于1212年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn35岁，母亲Lady Margaret MacLachlan35岁。他于1233年与Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia在苏格兰阿吉爾登利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1268年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特奧班享年56岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特登利。

nameMeanings.name: Eóghan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, supposedly derived from iúr ‘yew’ and meaning ‘born of yew’. It was borne in Irish legend by one of the two sons of Niall of the Nine Hostages.

variants.name: Euan
meanings: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Eóghan, now also bestowed by parents without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Ewan
meanings: The usual Anglicized form in Scotland and Northern Ireland of Gaelic Eóghan . It is also found in northern England from the 14th century onwards, and since the late 1990s has been one of the Gaelic names that enjoy wider currency.

variants.name: Evan
meanings: As a Welsh name this represents an Anglicized form of Iefan , a later development of Ieuan . As a Scottish name it is a variant of Euan . It is now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

en.lifeSummary: When Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill was born in 1212, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn, was 35 and his mother, Lady Margaret MacLachlan, was 35. He married Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia in 1233, in Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1268, in Oban, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Dunollie, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill est né en 1212, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret MacLachlan, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia en 1233, à Dunollie, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1268, à Oban, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Dunollie, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill 1212 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn 35 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret MacLachlan 35. Er hat 1233 in Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1268 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Oban, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunollie, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill è nato il nel 1212 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret MacLachlan, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia nel 1233, nel Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1268, nel Oban, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunollie, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaillが1212年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lornは35歳，母Lady Margaret MacLachlanは35歳であった。1233年にスコットランドアルグイルダノリーでEugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1268年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトオバンで56歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトダノリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill(이)가 1212년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret MacLachlan(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1233년 스컷랜드 아그이 던리에서 Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1268년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오반에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 던리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill nasceu em 1212, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret MacLachlan, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia em 1233, em Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1268, em Oban, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunollie, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill родился в 1212 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret MacLachlan, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia в 1233 г. в местности дунолли, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1268 г. в местности обань, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности дунолли, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill nació en 1212, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret MacLachlan, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia en 1233, en Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1268, en Oban, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Dunollie, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
